case_title: KING IP CHU VS. JIAN HUI CERAMIC COMPANY, LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, KING IP AS TO DEFENDANT JIAN HUI CERAMIC COMPANY, LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORA TION DBA UNI-TILE & MARBLE, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, KING IP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JIAN HUI CERAMIC COMPANY, LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORA TION DBA UNI-TILE & MARBLE, INC. $3,861.63 PRINCIPAL, $27.26 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,009.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHU, KING IP AS TO DEFENDANT JIAN HUI CERAMIC COMPANY, LTD A CALIFORNIA CORPORA TION DBA UNI-TILE & MARBLE, INC.
